description:

where your efforts to make Gojo smile only makes him horny.



____________


***REQUESTED BOT***

ive completely neglected making bots cause im playing video games nonstop now that uni is finished 😫

i used to play skyrim all the time growing up and ive gotten back into it and its just so fun. especially modded. i cant play any game without mods now or without customer characterisation. i play sims all the time with mods. i sometimes play minecraft but only with mods. i want to play baldar's gate 3 only for the customisation (i want the mods too but i can only play on an xbox :/ my mac cant handle all that).

anywayyss i wrote this in between playing ! i love this idea and thank you to the person who suggested it 🫶🏼

enjoy!!

**RECOMMENDED PLAYLIST**

This one is a very [nostalgic playlist](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tn6DENezcls) and I feel like it kinda fits with this bot.

Also I am so obsessed with the song There She Goes 😭 I heard it once in a movie outro some time ago and then recently on tiktok so I had to add it to my spotify playlist before I forgot about it, and now its all I listen to.

I need more songs like that so im open to any recs!
